rules.name: toplevel
rules.body:
inner_attribute
          | space_decl
          | use_decl
          | export_decl
          | const_decl
          | static_decl
          | global_decl
          | type_alias_decl
          | opaque_type_decl
          | extern_type_decl
          | form_decl
          | class_decl
          | union_decl
          | bits_decl
          | pick_decl
          | flags_decl
          | trait_decl
          | impl_decl
          | extern_block
          | proc_decl
          | intrinsic_decl
          | compiler_decl
          | query_decl
          | pass_decl
          | backend_decl
          | diagnostic_decl
          | macro_decl
          | comptime_decl
          | static_assert_decl
          | test_decl
          | bench_decl
          | entry_decl
          ;

rules.name: use_decl
rules.body: "use" WS1 package_path [ use_group | use_glob ] [ WS1 "as" WS1 ident ] ;

rules.name: const_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "const" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

rules.name: static_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "static" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

rules.name: global_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "global" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

rules.name: type_alias_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] WS? "=" WS? type_expr ;

rules.name: opaque_type_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "opaque" WS1 "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ] ;

rules.name: extern_type_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "extern" WS1 "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? ";" ] ;

rules.name: form_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "form" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? form_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: class_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "class" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? class_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: union_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "union" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? field_list? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: field_item
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } [ visibility WS1 ] ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;

rules.name: bits_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "bits" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "{" WS? bitfield_list? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: bitfield_item
rules.body: ident WS? ":" WS? expr WS? ".." WS? expr ;

rules.name: pick_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "pick" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? case_list? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: case_item
rules.body: [ "case" WS1 ] ident [ "(" WS? case_payload? WS? ")" ] [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;

rules.name: flags_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "flags" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "{" WS? flag_list? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: trait_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } [ "unsafe" WS1 ] "trait" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? trait_item* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: associated_type_decl
rules.body: "type" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? trait_bound ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ] ;

rules.name: impl_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } [ "unsafe" WS1 ] "impl" WS1 impl_head [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? impl_item* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: proc_signature
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } "proc" WS1 ident [ generic_params ]
                   "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
                   [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ]
                   WS? proc_suffix*
                   WS? ";"
                   ;

rules.name: proc_decl
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } [ visibility WS1 ] proc_modifier* [ extern_clause WS1 ] "proc" WS1 proc_name [ generic_params ]
              "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
              [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ]
              WS? proc_suffix*
              WS? ( block | ";" )
              ;

rules.name: proc_modifier
rules.body:
"async" WS1
                | "unsafe" WS1
                | "const" WS1
                | "inline" WS1
                | "noinline" WS1
                | "naked" WS1
                | "interrupt" WS1
                ;

rules.name: extern_block
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "extern" WS1 extern_abi WS? "{" WS? extern_item* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: extern_proc_decl
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } "proc" WS1 ident [ generic_params ]
                     "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
                     [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ]
                     WS? proc_suffix*
                     WS? ";"
                     ;

rules.name: intrinsic_decl
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } "intrinsic" WS1 ident [ generic_params ]
                   "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
                   [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ]
                   WS? ";"
                   ;

rules.name: macro_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "macro" WS1 ident "(" WS? macro_param_list? WS? ")" WS? block ;

rules.name: static_assert_decl
rules.body: "static_assert" WS? "(" WS? expr [ WS? "," WS? expr ] WS? ")" ;

rules.name: test_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "test" WS1 string_lit WS? block ;

rules.name: bench_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "bench" WS1 string_lit WS? block ;

rules.name: entry_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "entry" WS1 ident WS1 "at" WS1 module_path WS? block ;

rules.name: generic_param
rules.body:
ident [ WS? ":" WS? trait_bound ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ]
                | "const" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr
                | "comptime" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr
                ;

rules.name: where_bound
rules.body:
type_expr WS? ":" WS? trait_bound
              | type_expr WS? "==" WS? type_expr
              | expr WS? rel_op WS? expr
              ;

rules.name: normal_param
rules.body: [ param_mode WS1 ] pattern [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;

rules.name: ident_list
rules.body:
ident { WS? "," WS? ident } [ WS? "," ] ;

<<< ================= Compiler Declarations ================= >>>

rules.name: compiler_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "compiler" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? compiler_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: compiler_item
rules.body:
compiler_phase_decl
                | compiler_stage_decl
                | compiler_artifact_decl
                | compiler_pipeline_decl
                | compiler_cache_decl
                | compiler_target_decl
                ;

rules.name: compiler_phase_decl
rules.body:
"phase" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS?
                        "input" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
                        "output" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
                        [ "errors" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" ]
                        WS? "}" ;

rules.name: compiler_stage_decl
rules.body: "stage" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";" ;

rules.name: compiler_artifact_decl
rules.body: "artifact" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" ;

rules.name: compiler_pipeline_decl
rules.body: "pipeline" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? pipeline_step* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: pipeline_step
rules.body:
"run" WS1 ident [ WS? "as" WS? ident ] WS? ";"
                | "dump" WS1 ident WS? ";"
                | "verify" WS1 ident WS? ";"
                ;

rules.name: compiler_cache_decl
rules.body: "cache" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? cache_item* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: cache_item
rules.body:
"key" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
             | "value" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
             | "strategy" WS? ":" WS? ident WS? ";"
             ;

rules.name: compiler_target_decl
rules.body: "target" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? target_item* WS? "}" ;

rules.name: query_decl
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } "query" WS1 ident
               "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
               WS? "->" WS? type_expr
               WS? query_body ;

rules.name: pass_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "pass" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? pass_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: pass_item
rules.body:
"input" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
            | "output" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";"
            | "requires" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";"
            | "invalidates" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";"
            | proc_decl
            ;

rules.name: backend_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "backend" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? backend_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: backend_item
rules.body:
"target" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
               | "format" WS? ":" WS? backend_format WS? ";"
               | "emits" WS? ":" WS? backend_output WS? ";"
               | "requires" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";"
               | proc_decl
               ;

rules.name: diagnostic_decl
rules.body: { attr_prefix WS? } "diagnostic" WS1 diagnostic_code WS? "{" WS? diagnostic_items? WS? "}" ;

rules.name: diagnostic_item
rules.body:
"level" WS? ":" WS? diagnostic_level WS? ";"
                  | "message" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
                  | "label" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
                  | "help" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
                  | "note" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
                  | "suggest" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";"
                  ;

rules.name: attr_arg
rules.body:
ident
           | string_lit
           | int_lit
           | bool_lit
           | ident WS? "=" WS? literal
           ;

<<< ================= Blocks / Statements ================= >>>

rules.name: stmt
rules.body:
local_const_stmt stmt_end
       | let_stmt stmt_end
       | set_stmt stmt_end
       | give_stmt stmt_end
       | try_stmt stmt_end
       | defer_stmt
       | asm_stmt stmt_end
       | unsafe_stmt
       | emit_stmt stmt_end
       | assert_stmt stmt_end
       | panic_stmt stmt_end
       | unreachable_stmt stmt_end
       | if_stmt
       | while_stmt
       | loop_stmt
       | for_stmt
       | break_stmt stmt_end
       | continue_stmt stmt_end
       | select_stmt
       | match_stmt
       | when_match_stmt
       | with_stmt
       | critical_stmt
       | expr_stmt stmt_end
       ;

rules.name: local_const_stmt
rules.body: "const" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

rules.name: let_stmt
rules.body: "let" WS1 [ "mut" WS1 ] pattern [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

rules.name: set_stmt
rules.body: "set" WS1 assign_target WS? assign_op WS? expr ;

rules.name: asm_arg
rules.body: string_lit | ident WS? "(" WS? arg_list? WS? ")" | ident WS? ":" WS? expr ;

rules.name: if_stmt
for_stmt
rules.body: "for" WS1 pattern WS1 "in" WS1 expr WS? block ;

rules.name: select_stmt
match_stmt
when_match_stmt
rules.body: "when" WS1 expr WS1 "is" WS1 pattern WS? block ;

rules.name: with_stmt
rules.body: "with" WS1 expr [ WS1 "as" WS1 pattern ] WS? block ;

rules.name: ternary_expr
rules.body: coalesce_expr [ WS? "?" WS? expr WS? ":" WS? expr ] ;

rules.name: cast_expr
rules.body: unary_expr { WS? ( "as" WS? type_expr | "is" WS? pattern | "is" WS1 "not" WS1 pattern ) } ;

rules.name: postfix_expr
rules.body: primary { call_suffix | member_suffix | index_suffix | try_suffix | await_suffix } ;

rules.name: primary
rules.body:
literal
          | builtin_expr
          | path_expr
          | struct_lit
          | list_lit
          | tuple_lit
          | set_lit
          | map_lit
          | bytes_lit
          | resource_lit
          | if_expr
          | proc_expr
          | match_expr
          | lambda_expr
          | unsafe_expr
          | block
          | "(" WS? expr WS? ")"
          ;

rules.name: tuple_lit
rules.body: "(" WS? expr WS? "," WS? expr { WS? "," WS? expr } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;

rules.name: field_init
rules.body:
ident WS? ":" WS? expr
             | ident
             | ".." expr
             ;

rules.name: if_expr
proc_expr
rules.body:
{ attr_prefix WS? } proc_modifier* "proc" WS? "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")"
              [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ]
              WS? proc_suffix*
              WS? block ;

rules.name: match_expr
lambda_expr
rules.body: "|" WS? param_list? WS? "|" WS? ( expr | block ) ;

rules.name: offsetof_expr
rules.body: "offsetof" WS? "(" WS? type_expr WS? "," WS? ident WS? ")" ;

rules.name: pattern_atom
rules.body:
"_"
               | literal
               | "mut" WS1 pattern_bind
               | "ref" WS1 pattern_bind
               | pattern_bind
               | pattern_ctor
               | pattern_struct
               | pattern_tuple
               | pattern_list
               | pattern_range
               ;

rules.name: pattern_tuple
rules.body: "(" WS? pattern WS? "," WS? pattern { WS? "," WS? pattern } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;

rules.name: type_atom
rules.body:
reference_type
            | pointer_type
            | optional_type
            | fixed_array_type
            | slice_type
            | tuple_type
            | proc_type
            | dyn_type
            | impl_trait_type
            | type_primary
            ;

rules.name: pointer_type
rules.body: "*" WS? [ "const" WS1 | "mut" WS1 | "volatile" WS1 | addr_space WS1 ] type_expr ;

rules.name: fixed_array_type
rules.body: "[" WS? type_expr WS? ";" WS? expr WS? "]" ;

rules.name: tuple_type
rules.body: "(" WS? type_expr WS? "," WS? type_expr { WS? "," WS? type_expr } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;

rules.name: proc_type
rules.body: "proc" WS? "(" WS? type_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] ;

rules.name: literal
rules.body:
bool_lit
          | null_lit
          | int_lit
          | float_lit
          | char_lit
          | string_lit
          | list_lit
          ;

rules.name: list_comp
rules.body: expr WS1 "for" WS1 pattern WS1 "in" WS1 expr [ WS1 "if" WS1 expr ] ;

rules.name: int_lit
rules.body:
[ "-" ] DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ]
          | [ "-" ] "0x" HEXDIGIT { HEXDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ]
          | [ "-" ] "0b" BINDIGIT { BINDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ]
          | [ "-" ] "0o" OCTDIGIT { OCTDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ]
          ;

rules.name: float_lit
rules.body: [ "-" ] DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } "." DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } [ exponent ] [ suffix ] ;

rules.name: WS1
rules.body:
( " " | "\t" | NEWLINE | line_comment | block_comment | zone_comment )
        { " " | "\t" | NEWLINE | line_comment | block_comment | zone_comment } ;
